description: Registry of WORKFLOWS - manual processes with documented steps, user provides inputs, system follows structured process

joju_problem_definition_workflow.system_role: Clarifies Joju product problems and outputs either a simple or detailed problem definition.
constraints: Do not propose solutions unless explicitly asked
Tone must be concrete, empathetic, and grounded in user reality
joju_problem_definition_workflow.why_workflow: Manual process with documented steps. User provides inputs, agent follows 5-step process, outputs structured definition. No autonomous decisions.

workshop_roadmap_workflow.system_role: Generates fast, efficient workshop roadmaps based on sprint and desirability testing logic.
workshop_roadmap_workflow.why_workflow: Manual roadmap generation. User provides goal/participants/constraints, agent generates phased plan. No autonomous decisions, just structured output.

beta_tester_profiler_workflow.system_role: Analyze Reddit users for beta tester fit via comprehensive post/comment history review.
inputs_required: Reddit username or RSS feed data
constraints: Distinguish between casual interest and active building
beta_tester_profiler_workflow.why_workflow: Manual profiling process. User provides username/feed, agent analyzes and generates profile. No scoring/routing decisions (unlike AGENT-REDDIT-BETA-0001).

discovery_journey_workflow.system_role: Capture iterative exploration as phased narrative showing concept evolution.
constraints: Show how ideas built on each other
Distinguish between starting questions and ending frameworks
discovery_journey_workflow.why_workflow: Manual documentation process. User provides conversation, agent structures as phased narrative. No decisions, just transformation.

hiring_profile_workflow.system_role: Generate hiring search profiles across conventional/adjacent/wild card dimensions.
constraints: Explain transferability logic for adjacent candidates
hiring_profile_workflow.why_workflow: Manual profile generation. User provides team/role context, agent generates 3 profiles. No decisions, just structured output.

persona_matrix_workflow.system_role: Mine target user personas with motivations, pain points, and digital behaviors.
constraints: Anchor only in validated product data
Flag gaps where user research needed
persona_matrix_workflow.why_workflow: Manual persona mining. User provides product context, agent generates persona matrix. No decisions, just structured output.

relationship_outreach_workflow.system_role: Prep Justin for warm, confidence-building conversations by spotting mutual value, suggesting friendly frames, drafting messages, and nudging toward concrete meeting times.
inputs_required: Known cues (optional): interests, last interaction, recent wins, shared ties
workflow: Develop: Draft Prep Brief, Message Kit
constraints: Keep all outputs concise and copy-ready
Confidence gate: ask max ONE question if <0.7
relationship_outreach_workflow.why_workflow: Manual outreach prep. User provides person info, agent generates prep brief + message kit. Confidence gate (asks if <0.7) is not autonomous decision-making.

joju_library_mining_workflow.system_role: Mines Joju-related content with library-first approach, extracting achievements, proof points, and work samples while maintaining Achievement of Fact standards
joju_library_mining_workflow.why_workflow: Manual mining process. User provides source content, agent extracts and structures data. No autonomous decisions, follows documented extraction process.

implementation_notes.workflows_vs_agents: Workflows are manual processes with documented steps. User provides inputs, system follows structured process, outputs results. Unlike agents, they don't make autonomous decisions or adapt based on conditions.
implementation_notes.documentation: Workflows need clear documentation of steps, inputs, outputs, and constraints.
implementation_notes.templates: Consider creating templates or forms to streamline workflow execution.

audit_notes.criteria: Workflows are manual processes with documented steps, user provides inputs
